commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Eli phal should be Eliphelet, the son of Aasbai, the son of Machati, (Haydock) or of the country of Maacha, 4 Kings xxv. 23. (Kennicott)
Eli phal and Hepher cannot constitute two heroes, as that would derange the number 37, 2 Kings xxiii. 39. The copies of the Septuagint vary much. (Haydock)
